mapper.select: select id, notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, sort, is_deleted, sn.status, '官方' as create_user, sn.create_time from shop_notice sn where id = #{id} and sn.status = '0' and is_deleted = 0
select id, notice_title, notice_type from shop_notice sn where 1 = 1 and is_deleted = 0 and sn.`status` = '0' order by sort, create_time desc limit 5
mapper.insert: insert into shop_notice(id, notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, sort, is_deleted, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeType}, #{noticeContent}, #{sort}, #{isDeleted}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into shop_notice(id,notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, sort, is_deleted, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.noticeTitle}, #{entity.noticeType}, #{entity.noticeContent}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into shop_notice(id,notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, sort, is_deleted, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.noticeTitle}, #{entity.noticeType}, #{entity.noticeContent}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update notice_title = values(notice_title), notice_type = values(notice_type), notice_content = values(notice_content), sort = values(sort), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), status = values(status), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
